mentions.note: Largest IPO in history recently completed; Cramer notes aftermath creates opportunity for sleepy interregnum in market.

Musk's visionary empire with Starlink ISP disruption, rocket scarcity, Twitter/X, AI chip rental ($2.1B+ monthly), Cursor $60B acquisition, and potential Tesla merger upside. Multiple buyer motivations (collectors, team-owners, meme-traders) driving relentless momentum; Russell/Nasdaq rebalancing expected to spur more buying.
Elon Musk execution on space exploration unmatched; IPO perfectly priced; long-term call on AI, robotics, spaceflight dwarfing other industries.
